jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Voltas - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Voltas are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Voltas:
Voltas is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voltas!
